additional_rules.name: malloc-in-isr-or-critical
additional_rules.message: malloc/calloc/realloc/free in ISR or critical section — dynamic allocation is forbidden in real-time critical paths
additional_rules.fix_hint: Use statically allocated buffers or a pre-allocated pool. Move allocation to initialization code guarded by /* INIT-ONLY: dynamic alloc */.

additional_rules.name: missing-header-guard
additional_rules.message: Header file missing include guard (#ifndef MODULE_FILENAME_H pattern)
additional_rules.fix_hint: Add #ifndef MODULE_FILENAME_H / #define MODULE_FILENAME_H / #endif guard wrapping the entire header.

additional_rules.name: float-in-interrupt
additional_rules.message: Floating-point type in interrupt context — use fixed-point arithmetic (Q15/Q31) instead
additional_rules.fix_hint: Replace float/double with fixed-point types (int16_t for Q15, int32_t for Q31) and use shift-based arithmetic.
